trade.summary: Substantial bilateral trade facilitated by CETA. Canada exports natural resources, aerospace products, and agricultural goods to Spain. Spain exports vehicles, machinery, chemicals, and wine to Canada. Canadian tourism to Spain is also significant.

diplomatic.summary: Warm relations between NATO allies. The large Spanish-Canadian diaspora community (and vice versa in Quebec-Spain connections) supports cultural ties. Both cooperate on EU-Canada partnership frameworks and shared democratic values.

military.summary: Both are NATO allies. Joint exercises and interoperability programs. Spain and Canada cooperate in NATO operations. Some defense procurement cooperation.

financial.summary: Bilateral investment through CETA framework. Spanish companies (Santander, Iberdrola, Inditex) have Canadian operations. Canadian pension funds invest in Spanish infrastructure and real estate.

energy.summary: Canada exports LNG and crude oil to Spain (Spain is a major LNG importer). Growing renewable energy investment cooperation through Spanish energy companies active in Canada.

scientific.summary: Active scientific cooperation. Joint research programs in marine science, astrophysics, and health. Large Spanish-Canadian academic community. CSIC-NRC partnerships exist.
